title: Logz.io Log Document
description: Canonical shape of a log document returned by the Logz.io search API. Indexed by managed Elasticsearch / OpenSearch with the Logz.io system fields prefixed by `@` and `__` and customer fields nested under arbitrary keys.

_index.description: Underlying index the document was retrieved from.

_type.description: Legacy mapping type — kept for compatibility.

_score.description: Relevance score, if scoring is requested.

@timestamp.description: Event timestamp parsed by the Logz.io pipeline. Indexed for time-range queries.

type.description: Logz.io log type — used to route documents through Sawmill parsing pipelines.

message.description: Free-form message payload of the log event.

level.description: Log severity / level field (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG, etc.).

thread_name.description: Thread identifier on the originating runtime.

trace_id.description: Distributed-tracing trace identifier — used to join logs and spans.
